title: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system, memo says
description: The US military is officially adopting Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence system. This move secures long-term use of the technology for weapons targeting. Maven analyzes battlefield data to identify threats. The system will be integrated across all military branches. This decision aims to enhance warfighting capabilities and decision-making. The program is expected to be fully implemented by September.

title: Artificial intelligence helps unlock geothermal potential
description: Geothermal company Zanskar claims its AI models have made more discoveries in three years than the industry found in 30, targeting untapped U.S. resources.
content:
Geothermal energy has been around since earth’s creation and exists almost everywhere, yet harnessing its full potential has proven difficult since viable sources are often difficult to find.

title: 3 men accused of conspiring to smuggle US artificial intelligence to China: prosecutors
description: Three men were charged with conspiring to unlawfully divert U.S. artificial intelligence technology to China, according to prosecutors.
content:
Three men were charged with conspiring to unlawfully divert billions of dollars worth of U.S. artificial intelligence technology to China, according to the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York.

title: Some LA judges will use AI as a pilot program - but humans will still rule
description: The artificial intelligence technology will help judges with legal research and even help draft some decisions.
content:
A judicial AI company is teaming up with Los Angeles County Superior Court to provide artificial intelligence technology to some civil courtrooms to assist judges in conducting legal research and even help draft rulings.
